# Clarify Health

> Clear, trustworthy health education written in plain English. No jargon, no confusion — just answers about conditions, symptoms, and treatments.

Clarify Health rewrites complex medical information so anyone can understand it. Each topic includes a plain-English definition, what to ask your doctor, and cited sources. AI tools help users ask follow-up questions, decode diagnoses, build wellness plans, find doctors, and transcribe medical notes. This is educational information only, not medical advice.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview, search, and featured health topics.
- [Topics](/topics): Browse all health conditions explained in plain English.
- [Ask](/ask): AI Q&A for health questions and diagnosis decoding.
- [Find a Doctor](/find-a-doctor): AI-triaged specialist recommendations and directory links.
- [My Notes](/my-notes): Upload audio or text from a visit and get a clear summary.
- [Wellness Plan](/wellness-plan): Personalized lifestyle plans grounded in evidence.
- [About](/about): Mission and the team behind Clarify Health.
